ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the school is located */,
  "building_code" TEXT /* Building code of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* School's official website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the school can enroll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_borough FOREIGN KEY ("borough") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_building_code FOREIGN KEY ("building_code") REFERENCES building_codes ("building_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic data was recorded */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-teacher ratio */,
  "percent_free_lunch" REAL /* Percentage of students eligible for free lunch */,
  "num_teachers" INTEGER /* Number of teachers in the school */,
  "percent_black_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of students who are Black or Hispanic */,
  "percent_asian" REAL /* Percentage of students who are Asian */,
  "percent_white" REAL /* Percentage of students who are White */,
  "percent_other" REAL /* Percentage of students from other racial/ethnic backgrounds */,
  "percent_gender_female" REAL /* Percentage of female students */,
  "percent_gender_male" REAL /* Percentage of male students */,
  "percent_gender_non_binary" REAL /* Percentage of non-binary students */,
  "percent_ell" REAL /* Percentage of students who are English Language Learners */,
  "percent_special_ed" REAL /* Percentage of students in special education */,
  "percent_low_income" REAL /* Percentage of students from low-income families */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, educator, policymaker) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_codes" (
  "building_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building code */,
  "building_code" TEXT /* Building code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building code */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address associated with the building code */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the building can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which performance data is available */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the year is the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
